evals.name: save-to-reference
evals.prompt: save the file at 0-Inbox/test-resource-1-w.md to reference, name it test-ref-doc.md
evals.expected_output: File moved to <workspace.resources>/reference/test-ref-doc.md, source removed from Inbox.

assertions.text: Destination file content matches the original (preserved during move)

evals.name: save-to-research

evals.expected_output: File moved into a new research topic folder <workspace.resources>/research/2026-05-test-topic-prompt-caching-research/test-resource-2-w.md.
